groups.title: STARTS OF ONE-WORD JAMES BOND MOVIE TITLES
groups.explanation: STARTS OF ONE-WORD JAMES BOND MOVIE TITLES

hints: Verbs for entering or moving with an easy, unhurried swagger, more casual glide than purposeful rush.
Slangy ways to call something nonsense: four blunt labels for talk that sounds made-up or empty.
Styles of carry bags you might compare while shopping: shape, strap position, and silhouette are the clue.
Think spy-franchise trivia: each fragment can kick off a one-word film title from the same iconic series.
